cyber_issue: Unauthorized modification of infusion program / drug library
control: Mutual authentication, signed configuration, server-side order validation, dose range limits
rec: Enforce signed config + order validation; segment clinical network; alert on anomalous programming

cyber_issue: Unauthenticated wireless (BLE) command to insulin pump
control: Bonded pairing, authenticated commands, max-dose sanity limits
rec: Require authenticated pairing; cap maximum dose; alert on anomalous commands
Deploy authenticated telemetry; monitored firmware update via clinic

cyber_issue: Network flood / ransomware / RF jamming (availability loss)
control: Safe-state design, local fallback/buffering, resiliency, offline backups
rec: Design fail-safe + local autonomy; segment networks; tested backups/restore

control: Integrity checks, independent on-device alerting, validation
rec: Independent local alerting; integrity-verify alert path; anomaly detection

control: Adversarial testing, input validation, data/model integrity, monitoring
rec: Adversarial + OOD testing; sign datasets/models; monitor real-world performance

cyber_issue: Weak crypto / cloud misconfig / mobile data leakage
control: TLS, encryption at rest, IAM least-privilege, secure mobile storage
patient: Privacy harm; indirect safety via loss of trust
rec: Enforce TLS + at-rest encryption; CSPM baseline; MASVS mobile storage
Mandate code signing + secure boot + anti-rollback; verify on receipt

control: SBOM + SCA monitoring, patch SLAs, coordinated disclosure
rec: Maintain SBOM; monitor CISA KEV; meet severity-based patch SLAs

control: No default creds, unique authentication, secret scanning
rec: Remove defaults; provision unique credentials; scan builds for secrets

cyber_issue: Open storage / over-broad IAM in AWS/Azure/GCP
control: CIS baseline (CSPM), IAM least-privilege, audit logging
rec: Apply CIS benchmark via CSPM; least-privilege IAM; enable audit logs

cyber_issue: Insecure mobile storage / no pinning / rooted device
rec: Use platform secure storage + pinning; MASVS testing; integrity checks
